dj_text: That was Unknown. Let's keep the mood going with American Idiot (Medieval Style). One more left in the queue.
commercial_text: Listen up, folks! Are you sick of hearing music that's got more sense than a clown at Thanksgin?
hijack_text: Greetings, listeners of Intergalactic Groove FM from Dimensi
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: American Idiot (Medieval Style)
